title: Present Simple - To Be
explanation: Use 'am', 'is', 'are' to describe states and facts.
explanationHe: משתמשים ב-am, is, are לתיאור מצבים ועובדות.
rule: I am / He-She-It is / We-You-They are

title: Present Simple - Regular Verbs
explanation: Add -s or -es for he/she/it. Use 'do/does' for questions and negatives.
explanationHe: מוסיפים s- או es- בגוף שלישי. משתמשים ב-do/does לשאלות ושלילה.

title: Articles - A, An, The
explanation: 'A/An' for non-specific things, 'The' for specific things.
explanationHe: A/An לדברים לא ספציפיים, The לדברים ספציפיים.
examples: The cat is on the table.
rule: a + consonant sound | an + vowel sound | the + specific

title: Past Simple
explanation: Add -ed for regular verbs. Irregular verbs have special forms.
explanationHe: מוסיפים ed- לפעלים רגילים. לפעלים חריגים יש צורות מיוחדות.
rule: verb+ed (regular) | special form (irregular) | did + base verb (question/negative)

title: Present Continuous
explanation: Use am/is/are + verb-ing for actions happening now.
explanationHe: משתמשים ב-am/is/are + ing-פועל לפעולות שקורות עכשיו.

title: Comparatives & Superlatives
explanation: Short adjectives: add -er/-est. Long adjectives: use more/most.
explanationHe: תארים קצרים: מוסיפים er-/est-. תארים ארוכים: more/most.
examples: English is more interesting than math.

title: Present Perfect
explanation: Use have/has + past participle for experiences and unfinished time.
explanationHe: משתמשים ב-have/has + צורת עבר שלישי לחוויות ולזמן שלא נגמר.
examples: She has lived here for 5 years.

title: Conditional - First
explanation: If + present simple, will + verb. For real/possible situations.
explanationHe: If + הווה פשוט, will + פועל. למצבים אפשריים.
examples: If it rains, I will stay home.
If you study hard, you will pass.
rule: If + present simple, will + base verb

title: Passive Voice
explanation: Use be + past participle when the action is more important than who did it.
explanationHe: משתמשים ב-be + צורת עבר שלישי כשהפעולה חשובה יותר ממי שעשה אותה.
examples: The cake was made by my mother.

title: Reported Speech
explanation: Shift tenses back when reporting what someone said.
explanationHe: מזיזים את הזמנים אחורה כשמדווחים על מה שמישהו אמר.
examples: She told me she had finished.
They asked if I could help.
rule: present → past | past → past perfect | will → would
